name: Palm Reading Premium
short_description: Learn palm reading through interactive visual quizzes. Analyze your palm lines, finger shapes and hand features. Detailed readings for life, heart, head, fate & sun lines plus all fingers. 4K@120FPS*
detailed_description:
Palm Reading Premium is the most comprehensive palmistry and chirology guide on Steam. Learn the ancient art of palm reading through simple, engaging visual quizzes — no prior knowledge required. Just look at your hand, answer questions about your lines and finger shapes, and receive detailed personality and life insights based on the principles of palmistry.

✋ HOW IT WORKS

The app guides you step by step. You'll be shown clear images of different palm features — lines, shapes, mounts, and markings — and asked to identify which ones match your own hand. Based on your answers, you receive a detailed reading that reveals what your palm says about your personality, relationships, career, and life path.

📖 COMPLETE PALM ANALYSIS

Explore every aspect of your palm through dedicated reading sections:

✦ Life Line — vitality, energy, and life changes

✦ Heart Line — emotions, relationships, and love

✦ Head Line — intellect, thinking style, and decision-making

✦ Fate Line — career path and destiny

✦ Sun Line — success, creativity, and reputation

✦ All five fingers — Jupiter (index), Saturn (middle), Apollo (ring), Mercury (pinky), and Thumb

✦ Gifts and Marks — special signs on your palm and what they mean

Each section goes deep, with multiple questions building a complete picture of what your palm reveals.

🤚 LEFT HAND VS RIGHT HAND

Read your left hand to discover your natural tendencies — who you truly are. Read your right hand to see how you present yourself to the world. Compare both for the full picture.

👥 READ YOUR FRIENDS' PALMS TOO

Analyze your own palm or do readings for friends and family. It's a fascinating conversation starter — once you start reading palms at a gathering, everyone will want their turn.

🏆 MASTER THE ART

Work through all the reading categories and earn Steam Achievements as you go. By the time you've completed every section, you'll have a solid understanding of palmistry fundamentals.

Features:

✦ 4K 2D Cartoon - 4K@120FPS* / 4K@60FPS (* Requires >= 120Hz Monitor & 2.1 HDMI)

✦ Complete palmistry guide covering all major lines, fingers, mounts, and markings.

✦ Interactive visual quizzes — look at your palm, match the images, get your reading.

✦ No prior knowledge needed — the app teaches you as you go.

✦ Detailed personality and life insights based on palmistry principles.

✦ Read your own palm or analyze friends' hands.

✦ 16 Steam Achievements to unlock across all reading categories.

✦ No subscriptions, no in-app purchases — one purchase, full experience.

✦ Translated into 9 languages (English, French, Italian, German, Spanish, Greek, Portuguese, Russian, Japanese).
